title: USDA Variant Specs Production Contract
format_neutral_rules: contracts/document-model-productions/variant-spec.contract.json#laws — variant/variantSet spec kinds, parent-child rules, specifier=over invariant, variantSetChildren-vs-variantSetNames separation, and nested-variantSet rules are pinned in the format-neutral production. This contract adds USDA-specific grammar dispatch and storage mapping.

included: variantSetChildren maintenance on containing prim specs
variant specs stored as document-model specs

storage_mapping.VariantSetStatement: variant set spec plus parent variantSetChildren entry
storage_mapping.VariantStatement: variant spec under the containing variant set
storage_mapping.VariantContents: same child, property, and nested variant storage rules as prim contents
storage_mapping.VariantSpecifier: store specifier as over for USDA-authored variants
storage_mapping.VariantTypeName: leave typeName unauthored for USDA-authored variants

variant_set_statement.storage: variant set spec plus parent variantSetChildren entry
requirements: variantSet statements may appear wherever PrimItem permits them
the variant set name is stored as a child variant set name on the containing prim
variantSetChildren storage must remain distinct from variantSetNames listOp metadata

variant_statement.storage: variant spec with optional metadata and prim-like contents
requirements: variant names use the document-model variant-name grammar
variant metadata uses the same PrimMetadata parser as prim specs
variant contents may include prim specs, property specs, reorder statements, and nested variant set specs
USDA-authored variant specs store specifier as over and leave typeName unauthored

laws: variant set statements may appear wherever the USDA PrimItem grammar permits them
format_neutral_laws_hoisted: variant set and variant specs are authored layer storage, not composition evaluation (document-model-productions/variant-spec.contract.json#laws)
variant contents use the same document-model storage APIs as prim contents (document-model-productions/variant-spec.contract.json#laws)
variant specs report specifier=over and leave typeName unauthored (document-model-productions/variant-spec.contract.json#laws)
variantSetChildren on the containing prim or variant is the spec-storage list; variantSetNames is authored composition metadata (document-model-productions/variant-spec.contract.json#nesting_rules)
variantSet specs maintain variantChildren in agreement with stored variant specs (document-model-productions/variant-spec.contract.json#laws)
golden_groups: single variant set with one variant
prim and property specs inside variants
variant specifier and typeName storage rule
